_comment: STRUCTURAL SCAFFOLD. Content sections are placeholders derived from the GBP Recovery gameplan. Replace with the real proposal copy when the proposal document arrives. Status is 'draft' so this does not appear on the public proposals list until flipped to 'active'.
projectTitle_es: Recuperación del Perfil de Google Business

summary.headline: Reclaim Haven's primary client acquisition channel — full recovery for four suspended Google Business Profiles.
summary.body:
Haven Landscaping has four Google Business Profiles suspended across Victorville, Fontana/Pasadena, Rancho Cucamonga, and Irvine. For a service-area business, that channel is the lead pipeline — losing it means losing visibility in every market Haven serves.

We've spent weeks researching this problem from the inside out: cross-referencing real documented cases from local SEO forums and trade publications, incorporating direct feedback from a peer who survived an identical suspension and got reinstated, and validating every step against Google's official guidelines. The plan is operational, not speculative.

This proposal lays out the recovery: a phased reinstatement workflow that begins with preparation work we can complete today, escalates through credential gathering and a compliance audit, and culminates in coordinated appeals submitted with Google's current evidence standard — a continuous on-camera verification video showing the owner, the work truck, the equipment, and the documentation that proves Haven is a real business operating in the markets it claims.
highlights: Recovery plan covering all four suspended profiles, prioritized by market value
Pre-flight compliance audit that fixes every policy violation before the appeal lands — no wasted attempts
Verification video script aligned to Google's 2025 SAB standard, proven in independent reinstatement cases
Per-profile evidence dossier (LLC registration, CSLB license, utility, branded vehicle) packaged for one-shot submission
Escalation path through Google Business Profile Community + Product Expert if a denial occurs
TODO: replace highlights with final proposal copy when received

roadmap.description: Work that requires no account access. Done in parallel while client-side credentials are gathered. Removes the entire critical path from the wait state.
deliverables: Four polished appeal narratives, one per suspended location
Evidence dossier ZIP template with per-profile folder structure
Verification video script for the on-camera owner walkthrough
Profile ID validation against Google's Appeals Tool
Pre-flight compliance checklist covering SAB config, address visibility, name/license match, and duplicate detection

roadmap.description: Once client credentials and documentation arrive, a full audit and remediation pass on all four profiles BEFORE any appeal is filed.
deliverables: Login + verification across all four Google accounts
Suspension type identification (soft vs. hard) per profile
Duplicate profile detection and merge planning
All policy violations remediated in advance of submission

roadmap.description: Per-profile evidence packages assembled and the verification video produced to spec.
deliverables: Four ZIP dossiers (one per location) with all required documents
Continuous verification video filmed by the owner per script

roadmap.description: Coordinated submission across all four profiles, highest-priority market first. Owner availability locked in for the 60-minute evidence-upload window.
deliverables: Fontana/Pasadena, Rancho Cucamonga, Irvine appeals submitted same day
Case IDs captured from Google's confirmation emails
Evidence + video uploaded inside each 60-minute window

roadmap.description: Active tracking through Google's 4-6 week review window, with a defined escalation path if any profile is denied.
deliverables: Weekly status check on all four cases
Re-appeal package ready if first attempt is denied
Escalation through GBP Community Forum and Product Expert if needed

timeline.description: Phase 0 starts. Internal work runs in parallel while client credentials are gathered.
Account access, business documents, and suspension dates delivered. Phase 1 audit begins immediately.
All four profiles cleaned up; every policy violation remediated before any appeal is filed.
Phase 2 complete. All evidence packaged and video produced to spec.
Same-day submission across all four profiles. Case IDs captured.
Standard 4-6 week review window. Re-appeal or escalation path activated for any denial.

tiers.name: GBP Recovery — Full Engagement
tiers.description: End-to-end recovery for all four suspended profiles, including preparation, compliance audit, evidence dossiers, verification video coordination, appeal submission, and monitoring through reinstatement.
includes: Full Phase 0–4 execution as outlined in the roadmap
Evidence dossier assembly (one ZIP per location)
Coordinated submission across all four profiles
Re-appeal package + escalation path if denial occurs

tiers.name: Recovery + Ongoing GBP Management
tiers.description: Everything in the recovery engagement, plus 12 months of post-reinstatement profile management to prevent re-suspension and grow ranking.
includes: All deliverables from the recovery engagement
